texto: There are so many little girls who follow me and look up to me. I'm their role model, so I have to make sure I'm always being professional and not putting any swear words out there - just really putting positive things out there on the Internet.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jordyn Wieber sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “There are so many little girls who follow me and look up to me. I'm their role model, so I have t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, words, internet, útil em momentos de internet.
